case_title: VLADIMIR SMIRNOV ET AL VS. EXPEDIA

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-10-2021 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,258.69 FILED BY SMIRNOV, VLADIMIR ANDROSHCHUK, KATERYNA AS TO DEFENDANT EXPEDIA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-10-2021 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
ORDER ON REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM. THE REQUEST IS GRANTED. (HEARING SET FOR NOV-10-2021 AT 8:30AM)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SMIRNOV, VLADIMIR ANDROSHCHUK, KATERYNA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT EXPEDIA $496.00 PRINCIPAL, $65.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $561.00, PLEASE SEE ATTACHED MC-025 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY DEFENDANT EXPEDIA
DECLARATION RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY DEFENDANT EXPEDIA
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF **SEE SIGNATURE/RECD BY LINE** SERVED SEP-10-2021, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT EXPEDIA
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF SMIRNOV, VLADIMIR ANDROSHCHUK, KATERYNA AS TO DEFENDANT EXPEDIA

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-10-2021 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-10-2021 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFFS VLADIMIR SMIRNOV AND KATERYNA ANDROSHCHUK ARE PRESENT. DEFENDANT EXPEDIA IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM REPRESENTED BY LIDIYA KOLEVA. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
